case.title: TEXAS EX REL. PAN AMER. PROD. v. CITY OF TEXAS CITY

opinion.h1: TEXAS EX REL. PAN AMER. PROD. v. CITY OF TEXAS CITY, 355 U.S. 603 (1958)
opinion.h4: TEXAS EX REL. PAN AMERICAN PRODUCTION CO. ET AL. v. CITY OF TEXAS CITY, TEXAS, ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF TEXAS. No. 574. Decided March 3, 1958.
opinion.p: Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
355 U.S. 603 OOSTERHOUDT v. MORGAN ET AL., CONSTITUTING THE FLORIDA STATE BOARD OF ACCOUNTANCY. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF FLORIDA. No. 623. Decided March 3, 1958.
Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
Edward McCarthy and Elliott Adams for appellant.
Charles E. Pledger, Jr., Justin L. Edgerton and L. William Graham for appellees.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
